title: Why Your Phone Is A Miniature Supercomputer

segments.text: Your phone has more computing power than early supercomputers.
Now, you hold that power in your hand.
It can process billions of calculations per second.
Imagine what this technology can achieve in the future!
Think about how much power we carry daily.
Follow Curio for your daily dose of science.

description: Your phone is a mini supercomputer! Follow for daily science & tech! 📱
